objectives: Explain core system design tradeoffs and constraints
Identify architectural patterns and when to apply them
Draft a high-level architecture for a sample product
learning_path.title: Foundations of System Design and Software Architecture

objectives: Design REST and GraphQL APIs with clear contracts
Define versioning and compatibility strategies
Align API design with system architecture decisions
learning_path.title: API Design for Scalable Services

objectives: Model data for common access patterns
Choose between SQL and NoSQL based on requirements
Design schemas and indexes to support performance goals
learning_path.title: Database Design: SQL/NoSQL Modeling and Tradeoffs

objectives: Describe common distributed systems failure modes
Apply consistency and availability tradeoffs to designs
Design service interactions for reliability
learning_path.title: Distributed Systems Essentials

objectives: Map architectural components to managed cloud services
Design for scalability and resilience in the cloud
Evaluate cost and operational tradeoffs of cloud choices
learning_path.title: Cloud Platforms: Deploying Architecture on AWS/Azure/GCP

objectives: Design a CI/CD pipeline that supports safe releases
Integrate automated checks into the delivery workflow
Define rollback and promotion strategies
learning_path.title: CI/CD Pipelines for Reliable Delivery

objectives: Create a balanced test pyramid for a service
Define test boundaries and reliable fixtures
Use tests to prevent regressions during change
learning_path.title: Automated Testing Strategy: Unit, Integration, and E2E

objectives: Perform structured code reviews focused on correctness and risk
Debug common production and pre-production issues systematically
Identify root causes and propose targeted fixes
learning_path.title: Code Review and Debugging for Quality and Maintainability

objectives: Design observability signals aligned to service objectives
Use logs, metrics, and traces to diagnose incidents
Define dashboards and alerts that reduce noise
learning_path.title: Observability: Logging, Metrics, and Tracing

objectives: Identify performance bottlenecks using evidence from observability
Optimize APIs and data access paths for latency and throughput
Validate improvements with repeatable measurements
learning_path.title: Performance Optimization Across the Stack

objectives: Design authentication and authorization flows for services
Apply secure coding practices to reduce common vulnerabilities
Review designs for security risks and mitigations
learning_path.title: Security Engineering: Authn/Authz and Secure Coding

objectives: Communicate technical decisions and tradeoffs clearly to stakeholders
Translate customer needs into actionable technical requirements
Track customer interactions and outcomes using CRM workflows
learning_path.title: Technical Communication and Customer Workflow with CRM

matched_occupation.description: Technical sales representatives act for a business to sell its merchandise while providing technical insight for customers.
matched_occupation.label: technical sales representative
